name: [YAOC2] Policy Gateway
_doc: NemoClaw-style policy gateway. Receives ProposedAction from brain, validates schema, loads policy from infra-postgres, evaluates rules, routes to allow/deny/needs-approval, dispatches approved actions to sandbox workflows, writes audit log, responds to brain. v2026.03.2: Capability Guard added before Telegram send node — checks env vars and credentials are present before attempting delivery.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'error', message: 'Schema validation failed', errors: $json._gateway.errors }) }}

parameters.query: SELECT id, name, version, defaults, rules FROM yaoc2.policy_sets WHERE name = $1 LIMIT 1

parameters.text:
={{ '⚠️ *Capability Guard Failure*

Telegram credentials are not fully configured.
*Missing:* ' + ($('Guard — Telegram Ready?').first().json.missingFields ?? []).join(', ') + '

*Instructions:* ' + ($('Guard — Telegram Ready?').first().json.instructions ?? 'Check n8n environment variables.') }}

={{ '🔐 *Approval Required*

*Action:* ' + $('Evaluate Policy').first().json.action.name + '
*Target:* ' + $('Evaluate Policy').first().json.action.target_system + '
*Risk:* ' + $('Evaluate Policy').first().json.risk.level + '
*Requested by:* ' + $('Evaluate Policy').first().json.requester.display_name + '
*Intent:* ' + $('Evaluate Policy').first().json.intent.title + '

*ID:* `' + $('Evaluate Policy').first().json.id + '`

Reply with the ID above and APPROVE or DENY.' }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'pending-approval', proposed_action_id: $('Evaluate Policy').first().json.id, message: 'Action requires approval. Analyst has been notified via Telegram.' }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $('Evaluate Policy').first().json;
return [{ json: { ...item, _gateway: { ...item._gateway, deny_reason: `Action denied by policy rule: ${item._gateway.matched_rule}` } } }];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'denied', proposed_action_id: $('Build Deny Response').first().json.id, message: $('Build Deny Response').first().json._gateway.deny_reason }) }}
